items.hook: See your exact stamp duty and ABSD before you commit, free
items.caption: See your exact stamp duty and ABSD before you commit, free. propsight.sg, link in bio.
items.cap_zh: 在下手前先看清你的印花税和 ABSD，免费。propsight.sg，链接在简介。

items.hook: A 4-room flat rents for a few hundred dollars a month more than a 3-room in most towns
items.caption:
A 4-room flat rents for a few hundred dollars a month more than a 3-room in most towns. Whether it is worth the higher price depends on the yield. Check any block free at propsight.sg, link in bio.

Send this to someone deciding where to buy.
items.cap_zh:
四房式组屋的月租通常比三房式高出几百新元。是否值得那更高的买入价，要看回报率。免费查任何一栋，propsight.sg，链接在简介。

转发给还没决定买哪里的人。

items.hook: Private home prices edge up 0.5% in Q2 while HDB resale falls for second straight quarte
items.caption:
Private home prices edge up 0.5% in Q2 while HDB resale falls for second straight quarter. The two markets are pulling in opposite directions: private homes are holding their value while HDB resale flats are gradually getting cheaper. Full story and free tools at propsight.sg, link in bio.

Know someone flat hunting? Send it their way.
items.cap_zh:
Q2私宅价格微涨0.5%，HDB转售价连续第二季下跌。两个市场走势截然相反：私宅价格守稳，HDB转售价格则在慢慢走软。 完整报道和免费工具在 propsight.sg，链接在简介。

认识正在找房的人？转给他。

items.hook: 5 grants first-time buyers quietly leave on the table.
items.caption: First-time buyers can stack more housing grants than most realise. Here are the ones people quietly miss. Check exactly what you qualify for, free, link in bio. Save this before you book.
items.cap_zh: 第一次买房，能拿的津贴比很多人想的多。这些是大家默默错过的。免费查你符合哪些，链接在简介。买房前先存起来。

items.hook: HDB landlords are out-earning condo landlords: 6.1% vs 3.6%.
items.caption:
Right now, an HDB resale flat returns about 6.1% gross for a landlord, versus about 3.6% for a private condo. Bigger price tag does not mean bigger yield. See the real numbers on any home, free, at propsight.sg, link in bio.

Worth saving before you talk to an agent.
items.cap_zh:
现在，组屋转售出租的毛回报大约 6.1%，私宅公寓大约 3.6%。房价高不代表回报高。免费查任何房子的真实数字，propsight.sg，链接在简介。

找中介前，值得先存下来。

items.hook: Your flat may be worth more than the agent says.
The PropSight tools are free to use.
